news.t: How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23
Health Care Services and Equipment Stocks Poised for Gains

holdings.infoBox: XHE is an equity ETF with a total of 68 individual holdings. The top holdings are STAAR Surgical Company stock at 2.77%, Butterfly Network at 2.50%, NovoCure at 2.43%, Integra LifeSciences Holdings at 2.35%, and Axogen at 2.29%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Health Care Equipment ETF (XHE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of U.S. health care equipment and supplies companies. XHE was launched on Jan 26, 2011 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23
data.text: I leverage my firm's data to identify three red flags you can use to avoid the worst ETFs.

data.title: Health Care Services and Equipment Stocks Poised for Gains
data.text: While most attention in health care has been going to large pharma companies, the charts suggest opportunities in niche subsectors.
